title: Sawing Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Wood
description: Set up, operate, or tend wood sawing machines. May operate computer numerically controlled (CNC) equipment. Includes lead sawyers.

tasks.text: Inspect and measure workpieces to mark for cuts and to verify the accuracy of cuts, using rulers, squares, or caliper rules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Adjust saw blades, using wrenches and rulers, or by turning handwheels or pressing pedals, levers, or panel buttons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mount and bolt sawing blades or attachments to machine shafts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up, operate, or tend saws or machines that cut or trim wood to specified dimensions, such as circular saws, band saws, multiple-blade sawing machines, scroll saws, ripsaws, or crozer machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect stock for imperfections or to estimate grades or qualities of stock or workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor sawing machines, adjusting speed and tension and clearing jams to ensure proper operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Sharpen blades, or replace defective or worn blades or bands, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide workpieces against saws, saw over workpieces by hand, or operate automatic feeding devices to guide cuts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clear machine jams, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lubricate or clean machines, using wrenches, grease guns, or solvents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust bolts, clamps, stops, guides, or table angles or heights, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine logs or lumber to plan the best cuts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Trim lumber to straighten rough edges or remove defects, using circular saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Count, sort, or stack finished workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position and clamp stock on tables, conveyors, or carriages, using hoists, guides, stops, dogs, wedges, or wrenches.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure and mark stock for cuts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate panelboards of saw or conveyor systems to move stock through processes or to cut stock to specified dimensions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine blueprints, drawings, work orders, or patterns to determine equipment set-up or selection details, procedures to be used, or dimensions of final products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select saw blades, types or grades of stock, or cutting procedures to be used, according to work orders or supervisors' instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut grooves, bevels, or miters, saw curved or irregular designs, and sever or shape metals, according to specifications or work orders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Unclamp and remove finished workpieces from tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dispose of waste material after completing work assignments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
